MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ANTONIA R KYLE IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DECEMBER 15, 2010. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE AN INITIAL PAYMENT OF $200.00 IN NOVEMBER, 2010. JUDGMENT SHALL CONTINUE TO ACCURE INTEREST PENDING PAYMENT IN FULL.
